mapper.select:
select * from busertable where ""=""
and concat(user_id) like concat('%',#{user_id},'%')
and concat(uidnum) like concat('%',#{uidnum},'%')
and concat(upwd) like concat('%',#{upwd},'%')
and concat(uname) like concat('%',#{uname},'%')
and concat(uidphoto) like concat('%',#{uidphoto},'%')
